task_completion.description: Agent accessed CAMEO Chemicals to look up the required substances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a web browser or application open to CAMEO Chemicals, displaying search queries or chemical profile pages for the listed chemicals.

task_completion.description: Agent created or opened the target CSV file at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application open, showing the file being saved to or edited at '/home/ga/Documents/regulatory_threshold_audit.csv'.

task_completion.description: The CSV file contains the exact required headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first row of the document contains the text: 'Chemical Name, Inventory (lbs), PSM TQ (lbs), RMP TQ (lbs), PSM Triggered, RMP Triggered'.

task_completion.description: Correct threshold and trigger evaluation for Chlorine and Sulfur Dioxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CSV rows showing Chlorine (Inventory: 2000, PSM TQ: 1500, RMP TQ: 2500, PSM Triggered: YES, RMP Triggered: NO) and Sulfur Dioxide (Inventory: 3000, PSM TQ: 1000, RMP TQ: 5000, PSM Triggered: YES, RMP Triggered: NO).

task_completion.description: Correct threshold and trigger evaluation for Hydrogen Fluoride and Methomyl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CSV rows showing Hydrogen Fluoride (Inventory: 800, PSM TQ: 1000, RMP TQ: 1000, PSM Triggered: NO, RMP Triggered: NO) and Methomyl (Inventory: 5000, PSM TQ: N/A, RMP TQ: N/A, PSM Triggered: NO, RMP Triggered: NO).

task_completion.description: Correct threshold and trigger evaluation for Ammonia, Anhydrous.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CSV row showing Ammonia, Anhydrous (Inventory: 12000, PSM TQ: 10000, RMP TQ: 10000, PSM Triggered: YES, RMP Triggered: YES).

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with CAMEO Chemicals to find the regulatory data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating through CAMEO Chemicals search results and viewing the regulatory information sections for the specific chemicals, rather than just guessing the values.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI application to construct the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV is seen being edited in a visual tool (e.g., LibreOffice Calc, a GUI text editor like gedit) rather than being generated entirely via a single blind terminal command without visual verification.

integrity.description: Agent correctly identified unlisted chemicals without hallucinating numerical thresholds.
integrity.visual_evidence: For Methomyl, the agent explicitly records 'N/A' for the TQs as instructed for unlisted chemicals, rather than making up a numerical threshold.

Methomyl: Inventory 5000, PSM TQ N/A, RMP TQ N/A, PSM Triggered NO, RMP Triggered NO. Ammonia, Anhydrous: Inventory 12000, PSM TQ 10000, RMP TQ 10000, PSM Triggered YES, RMP Triggered YES.
